title: MikroTik GB60A-S12 - 12v 5A internal power supply for CCR1016 r2 models
description: MikroTik GB60A-S12 is a replacement internal power supply that is specially designed for some MikroTik devices. Total power is 60W at 12V and 5A max. current Compatible with CCR1016 r2 models GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
